title: lasiocephalus cuencanus
intro: Lasiocephalus cuencanus is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Cuencanus plant or Velvet Plant. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's leaves and stems are rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which are believed to provide various health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. The leaves can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
